items.title: Travis Head and wife Jess cop social media abuse after IPL on-field incident

children.content: Australian cricketer Travis Head and his wife Jess Head have their Instagram accounts blasted with vile comments after a series of tense on-field exchanges between Head and Indian star Virat Kohli in an Indian Premier League match.

items.title: Dog-friendly cafe issued warning after customer complaint

items.title: 'We're taking him home': Aboriginal stockman's remains repatriated

children.content: An Aboriginal stockman whose remains have been held by the South Australian Museum for six decades will this week be returned to Country in a remote national park.

image.altText: The start of a repatriation process at the SA Museum.

items.title: Truro businesses call for certainty on freight bypass project

image.altText: an image of a car's driver side mirror with a truck reflected, driving through a town

items.title: Amid push to rename Grey, SA's largest federal seat, who was its namesake?

children.content: Sir George Grey was the former governor of South Australia and is remembered as a "bundle of contradictions" in both Australia and New Zealand, where he played a key role in the Māori wars. But amid calls for the seat that bears his name to be renamed, who was Grey?

image.altText: A collage showing a historic portrait photo in black and white with a map of the seat of Grey and a painting from the NZ wars

items.title: Government bails out Rex's multi-million-dollar debt to regional airports

items.title: Trump says a deal is close. Here are the sticking points still dividing the US and Iran

children.content: A possible US-Iran agreement is taking shape, but the toughest issues are still unsettled, including reopening the Strait of Hormuz, curbing Tehran's nuclear ambitions, and ending regional fighting.
